name: тАЛHoneybook
highlight_text: тАЛCategory: Client Experience & Small Agency CRM
description:
What Honeybook Does

HoneyBook is extremely popular among smaller agencies (1тАУ10 employees). тАЛIt focuses on "Clientflows", that is, it combines the proposal, the contract, and the first payment into one beautiful, interactive file.

Source: Honeybook

тАЛKey Features

тАЛЁЯПЖ Smart Files: Highly customizable documents that allow clients to select services and pay in one go.

тАЛЁЯПЖ Automated Scheduling: Integrated booking so clients can pay a retainer and book their kickoff call simultaneously.

ЁЯПЖ Simple Invoicing: Very easy to set up recurring payments for monthly retainers.

тАЛBenefits of Honeybook

тАЛThe biggest benefit is speed. You can go from a lead to a signed contract and paid deposit in minutes. For agencies selling "packaged" services, it makes the onboarding feel high-end.

тАЛPricing

  • тАЛStarter: $36/mo
  • тАЛEssentials: $59/mo
  • тАЛPremium: $129/mo

All the plans start with a free trial. There are also significant discounts available on annual pricing. 

тАЛPros

тАЛтЬЕ Highest-rated support for smaller teams.

тЬЕ The most "beautiful" client-facing interface on the market.

тЬЕ Templates that save hours of manual proposal drafting.

тАЛCons

тАЛЁЯЪл Hard to manage a high volume of local business locations (no location-specific hierarchy).

ЁЯЪл Limited advanced reporting for agency profitability.

тАН
